name: ChatGPT
tagline: The world's most popular AI assistant
description: ChatGPT is a conversational AI developed by OpenAI. It can write, analyze, code, summarize, translate, and engage in nuanced multi-turn conversations. Available via web, API, and mobile apps.
latestUpdate: GPT-5.5 default model (Apr 2026); ChatGPT 1 BILLION WAU (May 2026, fastest consumer product ever); GPT Image 2 launched (Apr 2026); DALL-E 2/3 removed from API May 2026; Ads on free tier (Feb 2026); 'Go' tier $8/mo; Codex coding agent 3M weekly users; Personal Finance feature (Pro, May 2026)
history: Launched Nov 30 2022 to unexpected viral success. Reached 1M users in 5 days, 100M in 2 months. Prompted Google to declare a 'code red'. Plus subscription Feb 2023. GPT-4 Mar 2023. Custom GPTs & GPT Store Jan 2024. Advanced Voice Mode and persistent memory 2024. o1 reasoning model Sep 2024. GPT-4.5 (preview) Feb 2025. o3 + o4-mini released Apr 2025. GPT-4.1 family (1M context) Apr 2025. GPT-5 / GPT-5.5 (2026). 1B WAU milestone May 2026.

metrics.growth: 400M WAU Jan 2025 → 900M WAU Feb 2026 → 1B WAU May 2026

name: Claude
tagline: Safety-first AI with superior long-context understanding
description: Claude is Anthropic's AI assistant focused on safety, reliability, and interpretability. Excels at long-document analysis, nuanced reasoning, and following complex instructions.
latestUpdate: Claude Opus 4.8 (May 2026) current flagship; Claude Code GA with GitHub Actions & VS Code/JetBrains native; $45B ARR at Anthropic; IPO filed confidentially Jun 2026; API: $5/M input, $25/M output (fast mode: $10/$50); controllable effort level; Files API, MCP connector, 1-hour prompt caching
history: Mar 2023: Claude 1 launched via API. Jul 2023: Claude 2 with 100K context window. Mar 2024: Claude 3 family (Haiku/Sonnet/Opus). Jun 2024: Claude 3.5 Sonnet tops coding benchmarks. Oct 2024: Computer Use. Nov 2024: Claude 3.5 Haiku. Feb 2025: Claude 3.7 Sonnet with extended thinking. May 2025: Claude 4 Opus and Sonnet — Opus leads SWE-bench. May 2026: Claude Opus 4.8 flagship. Jun 2026: IPO filed confidentially. Amazon total investment: $33B+.

name: Gemini
tagline: Google's multimodal AI deeply integrated with Workspace
description: Gemini is Google's flagship AI model available in multiple sizes. Deep integration with Google Workspace (Docs, Sheets, Gmail) and native multimodal capabilities including image and video understanding.
latestUpdate: Gemini 3.5 Flash default since May 19, 2026 (4× faster than frontier competitors; Terminal-Bench 76.2%, MCP Atlas 83.6%); Gemini 3.5 Pro rolling out Jun 2026; 750M MAU on Gemini app; 2B users via AI Overviews in Search; Gemini Spark 24/7 personal agent; Google AI subscriptions rebranded (Ultra $99.99/mo); 8.5M developers monthly
history: Bard launched Feb 2023 (rocky start). Rebranded to Gemini Dec 2023. Gemini 1.5 Pro with 1M context Feb 2024. Deep Research Dec 2024. Gemini 2.0 Flash Dec 2024. Gemini 2.5 Pro (Mar 2025) hits #1 on LMArena. Gemini 2.5 Flash (May 2025) best speed/intelligence ratio. Gemini 3.5 Flash default May 2026. Gemini 3.5 Pro rolling Jun 2026. Google AI Ultra cut to $99.99/mo.

metrics.users: 750M MAU (Gemini app, Q4 2025); 2B users via AI Overviews in Search; 350M paid subscriptions; 8.5M developers monthly

name: GitHub Copilot
tagline: Your AI pair programmer in any IDE
description: GitHub Copilot uses OpenAI Codex to suggest code completions, entire functions, and documentation as you type. Supports 20+ languages and integrates with VS Code, JetBrains, Neovim, and more.
latestUpdate: Usage-based AI Credits billing launched Jun 1 2026 (pay per request); Copilot Pro+ $39/mo; Copilot Max $100/mo with advanced reasoning; 20M+ users (Apr 2026); Copilot coding agent embedded in GitHub.com; SWE-bench top performer via Claude Opus 4.8
history: Technical preview Jun 2021. GA Jun 2022. Grew to 1M users within first year — fastest Microsoft product to reach $100M ARR. Business tier 2023. Expanded to multi-model (GPT-4o, Claude, Gemini) 2024. Free tier launched late 2024. Agent mode with autonomous multi-step tasks 2025. Usage-based AI Credits billing Jun 1 2026. Copilot Pro+ ($39) and Max ($100) tiers introduced.

pricingTiers.name: Pro+
features: Access to premium models incl. Claude Opus 4.8

name: Cursor
tagline: The AI-first code editor for pair programming with LLMs
description: Cursor is a fork of VS Code with native AI capabilities. Offers chat-based code editing, multi-file context awareness, and the ability to apply AI edits across your codebase.
latestUpdate: Cursor reached $3B ARR (Apr 2026); 1M+ DAU; 64% of Fortune 500 use Cursor; $50B valuation talks in progress (Jun 2026); Background agents, BugBot, Memory; Claude Opus 4.8 as top-tier model option
history: Founded by MIT students 2022. Built as VS Code fork. Launched Mar 2023. Viral growth after Claude 3.5 Sonnet integration mid-2024. Raised at $400M valuation Aug 2024. Grew to $100M ARR by Jan 2025. $9.9B Series C (Andreessen Horowitz, Thrive) May 2025. Cursor 1.0 with autonomous background agents. Hit $3B ARR by Apr 2026 with 64% Fortune 500 penetration. Secondary market valuation discussions at $50B as of Jun 2026.

name: Midjourney
tagline: Stunning AI imagery for creatives and designers
description: Midjourney generates high-quality artistic images from text prompts via Discord. Known for its distinctive aesthetic quality and ability to produce publication-ready artwork.
latestUpdate: Midjourney v8.1 (Apr 2026) - highest detail and realism yet; Video V1 general availability with 60% MoM growth; web editor with multi-layer support; personalization engine; estimated $700M+ ARR (Jun 2026)
history: Founded 2021 by David Holz (Leap Motion co-founder). Open beta Jul 2022. Bootstrapped to profitability with ~50 employees. V4 Nov 2022, V5 Mar 2023, V6 Dec 2023. Launched own web app 2024. V6.1 Jul 2024. V7 Mar 2025 - draft mode. V8 late 2025 - major quality upgrade. Video V1 GA with 60% MoM growth. V8.1 Apr 2026 - highest detail and photorealism yet. First AI art tool to reach $500M+ ARR with no outside funding.

name: GPT Image 2
tagline: OpenAI's image generation - GPT Image 2 replaces DALL-E 2/3
description: GPT Image 2 (gpt-image-2) is OpenAI's latest image generation model, released Apr 2026. DALL-E 2 and DALL-E 3 were removed from the API on May 12, 2026. GPT Image 2 delivers superior text rendering, photorealism, and instruction following. Available natively in ChatGPT and via API.
cons: Midjourney still better for artistic styles
latestUpdate: GPT Image 2 (Apr 2026) - successor to GPT Image 1; DALL-E 2 and DALL-E 3 removed from API May 12 2026; GPT Image 2 natively in ChatGPT free tier (limited); enhanced text rendering and photorealism; $0.04/image standard

name: Stable Diffusion
tagline: Open-source image generation you can run locally
description: Stable Diffusion is an open-source latent diffusion model for image generation. Can be run locally on consumer hardware, with a massive ecosystem of fine-tuned models and ControlNet extensions.
latestUpdate: SD 3.5 Large Turbo (fast inference, Apr 2025); Stability AI restructured under new CEO (2025); community ecosystem thrives independently via ComfyUI & A1111
history: Released Aug 22, 2022 - open-source release triggered explosion of AI art tools. SDXL (1.0) Jul 2023 - photorealism leap. Stability AI faced financial difficulties 2024; CEO Emad Mostaque resigned Mar 2024. Despite company struggles, SD model ecosystem thrives independently. SD 3 (Mar 2024) and SD 3.5 (Oct 2024) open-sourced.

name: Runway
tagline: Professional AI video generation and editing
description: Runway ML provides AI-powered video tools including Gen-2 text-to-video, motion brush, background removal, and a full creative suite for video professionals.
latestUpdate: Gen-4.5 (Jun 2026) - enhanced temporal consistency, 4K 60fps option; Runway API now enterprise-only (Jan 2026); $315M Series E (Feb 2026) at $5.3B valuation; ~$300M ARR; used in Netflix and A24 productions
history: Founded 2018 by Cristóbal Valenzuela. Co-developed original Stable Diffusion 2022. Gen-1 Mar 2023. Gen-2 Nov 2023. $141M Series D at $1.5B valuation Jun 2023. Gen-3 Alpha Jun 2024. $308M at $3B valuation Oct 2024. Gen-4 Mar 2025 - character consistency across scenes. $315M Series E at $5.3B valuation Feb 2026. API restricted to enterprise Jan 2026. Gen-4.5 Jun 2026 with 4K 60fps. Used in Netflix originals and A24 feature films.

name: ElevenLabs
tagline: Hyper-realistic AI voice synthesis and cloning
description: ElevenLabs creates ultra-realistic text-to-speech voices and can clone any voice from a short sample. Used for audiobooks, podcasts, video narration, and accessibility applications.
underlyingModel: Eleven v3 (Feb 2026, 70+ languages, inline audio tags)
latestUpdate: Eleven v3 (Feb 2026) - 70+ languages, inline audio tags for emotion/pacing control, SSML-like markup; $500M Series D (Sequoia, NVIDIA, Salesforce, BlackRock) at $11B valuation; $500M+ ARR (Jun 2026); Personal AI Voice cloning expanded
history: Founded 2022 by Mati Staniszewski and Piotr Dąbkowski in Warsaw. Launched Jan 2023. $19M Series A (a16z) Jun 2023. Unicorn ($1.1B) Jan 2024. $180M Series C at $3.3B Jan 2025. Conversational AI platform 2024. Eleven v3 released Feb 2026 — 70+ languages and inline audio tags for precise emotional control. $500M Series D (Sequoia, NVIDIA, Salesforce, BlackRock) at $11B valuation. Hit $500M+ ARR by Jun 2026.

name: Perplexity
tagline: AI-powered answer engine with live cited sources
description: Perplexity AI combines LLMs with real-time web search to provide accurate, cited answers. Includes Pro Search, file uploads, focus modes, and a research API.
underlyingModel: Sonar Pro ($3/$15 per M tokens, Jun 2026)
latestUpdate: Comet browser (free, Mar 18 2026) - AI-native browser with Perplexity built-in; Max tier $200/mo for power users; $500M ARR (2026, +335% YoY); $22.6B valuation; Sonar Pro API $3/$15 per M tokens; Personal Computer hardware in development
history: Founded Dec 2022 by Aravind Srinivas (ex-Google/OpenAI), Denis Yarats, Andy Konwinski, Johnny Ho. Grew from 1M to 100M+ MAU. Jeff Bezos, NVIDIA, SoftBank invested. Pro with model choice Sep 2023. Sonar search-optimized LLM family. Perplexity Assistant Jan 2025. $18B valuation Mar 2025. Comet browser launched free Mar 18 2026. $500M ARR by 2026 (+335% YoY). $22.6B valuation. Max tier $200/mo launched. Personal Computer hardware announced.

pricingTiers.name: Pro
features: Sonar Pro / Claude Sonnet 4.6 / GPT-4.1 choice

name: Pinecone
tagline: The managed vector database for production AI apps
description: Pinecone is a fully managed vector database optimized for similarity search at scale. Core infrastructure for RAG applications, semantic search, and recommendation systems.

name: LangChain
tagline: The framework for building LLM-powered applications
description: LangChain provides abstractions for chaining LLM calls, integrating tools and memory, building agents, and connecting to data sources. Available in Python and JavaScript.
underlyingModel: Any LLM (OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, Mistral, Llama, Cohere - 60+ providers)
latestUpdate: LangGraph Platform GA (2025) - deploy & scale stateful agents; LangSmith v2 with evals & prompt registry; LangChain v0.3 with simplified interface; MCP integration

metrics.users: 10M+ GitHub stars, used by 80%+ of LLM developers

history: Created by Harrison Chase, released Oct 2022 as a side project. Exploded in popularity as ChatGPT API launched. Became the dominant LLM framework. $25M Series A Feb 2023. $25M Series B Jun 2023. LangSmith observability platform 2023. LangGraph for stateful agents 2024. LangChain v0.3 simplification after criticism of complexity.

name: Hugging Face
tagline: The GitHub of machine learning - host, find, and deploy models
description: Hugging Face hosts 500,000+ ML models, datasets, and Spaces. The Transformers library provides easy access to BERT, GPT, Llama, and thousands of fine-tuned models.
underlyingModel: 1M+ community models (Llama 4, Gemma 3, Mistral, Phi-4, SDXL, Whisper, BERT, etc.)
latestUpdate: 1M+ models milestone (2025); Inference Providers marketplace (10+ backends: Together, Groq, Fireworks); SmolLM2 & SmolVLM tiny models; Serverless Inference API expansion; Hugging Face Assistants
history: Founded 2016 as a chatbot app. Pivoted to open-source NLP 2018. Transformers library 2019 - immediately becomes the standard. Model Hub launched. Grew to 'GitHub of AI'. $235M Series D at $4.5B (Google, Amazon, NVIDIA, Salesforce) Aug 2023.

name: OpenAI API
tagline: Build AI products on GPT-4, embeddings, and more
description: The OpenAI API provides programmatic access to GPT-4o, GPT-4, GPT-3.5, DALL-E 3, Whisper, and embeddings models. Powers thousands of AI applications.
latestUpdate: GPT-4.1 family (Apr 2025, 1M context, 26% cheaper than GPT-4o); o3 flagship reasoning; o4-mini with vision; Responses API for agentic workflows; Realtime API GA; Batch API (50% off); prompt caching
history: API launched Jun 2020 (GPT-3 era). Became the de facto standard for AI APIs. GPT-4 API Mar 2023. Function calling Jun 2023. GPT-4o API May 2024. Realtime API (WebSocket) Sep 2024. o1 API Sep 2024. Batch API for 50% discount on async workloads. GPT-4.5 (preview) Feb 2025. o3 + o4-mini Apr 2025. GPT-4.1 family (1M context, lowest latency) Apr 2025 - major step for long-context apps.

name: Notion AI
tagline: AI writing and summarization built into your workspace
description: Notion AI integrates LLM capabilities directly into Notion pages. Write, summarize, translate, brainstorm, and fill databases with AI - all without leaving your workspace.
latestUpdate: Notion AI 2.0 (2025): AI-powered Q&A across all pages, meeting notes, database autofill, AI chart generation, web search from within Notion
history: Notion launched 2016. AI features (powered by OpenAI) announced Oct 2022, rolled out Feb 2023. Crossed $50M ARR in 2021. AI helped reignite growth - became one of the fastest AI feature rollouts. AI add-on priced at $10/user/mo on top of existing Notion plans.

name: Grammarly
tagline: AI writing assistance for clarity, tone, and correctness
description: Grammarly uses AI to check grammar, spelling, punctuation, clarity, engagement, and delivery in real-time across browsers, apps, and documents.
latestUpdate: GrammarlyGO generative AI (2023), context-aware tone rewriter, Knowledge Share for teams
history: Founded 2009 in Kyiv, Ukraine by Oleksii Shevchenko and Max Lytvyn. Raised $200M at $13B valuation 2021 - one of largest in edtech/productivity. GrammarlyGO (AI generation) launched Apr 2023 based on GPT-4. Expanded from grammar checker to full writing assistant. Revenue largely from individual Premium subscriptions.

name: Descript
tagline: Edit video and podcast by editing the transcript
description: Descript revolutionizes audio/video editing by letting you edit media by editing text. Features AI overdub for voice correction, filler word removal, and automatic transcription.
cons: Export quality limits on free tier

name: Whisper
tagline: OpenAI's open-source speech recognition model
description: Whisper is a general-purpose speech recognition model trained on 680,000 hours of multilingual data. Supports transcription and translation across 99 languages with state-of-the-art accuracy.

name: Weaviate
tagline: Open-source vector database for hybrid search
description: Weaviate is an open-source vector database that supports hybrid search combining dense and sparse vectors. Features built-in vectorization, multi-tenancy, and GraphQL API.

name: Jasper
tagline: Enterprise AI writing for marketing teams
description: Jasper is an enterprise AI content platform built for marketing. Offers brand voice customization, SEO integration, campaign generation, and team collaboration features.

name: Replicate
tagline: Run AI models in the cloud with a simple API - now part of Cloudflare
description: Replicate allows you to run thousands of open-source AI models with a single API call. No infrastructure setup required - pay per prediction for models like Llama, Stable Diffusion, and Whisper. Acquired by Cloudflare in 2025, enabling global edge inference at Cloudflare's 200+ PoPs worldwide.
latestUpdate: Acquired by Cloudflare 2025 - enabling AI inference at Cloudflare's global edge network (200+ PoPs); Cloudflare Workers AI integration; expanded model catalog with Llama 4 and Gemma 3 support

name: Cohere
tagline: Enterprise NLP for search, classification, and generation
description: Cohere provides enterprise-grade language AI including Command for generation, Embed for semantic search, and Rerank for improving search relevance. Strong focus on enterprise deployment.

name: v0
tagline: Generate React UI components with a chat interface
description: v0 by Vercel generates React and Next.js UI components from text descriptions and screenshots. Produces clean, production-ready code using shadcn/ui and Tailwind CSS.
latestUpdate: v0 Agent mode (full-stack app generation, May 2025); deploy directly to Vercel; GitHub sync; Next.js 15 + shadcn/ui native; CLI tool for local dev

metrics.users: Millions of components generated (Vercel doesn't disclose)

history: Launched Sep 2023 as Vercel's AI UI generator. Immediately viral - developers shared stunning React components generated in seconds. Built on top of shadcn/ui and Tailwind. Became the standard for 'design-to-code' workflows. Added VS Code extension and API in 2024.

name: Mistral AI
tagline: European frontier AI - Mistral Large 2 & Codestral lead open-weight models
description: Mistral AI's latest models include Mistral Large 2 (123B, rivals GPT-4o), Mistral Small 3 (24B, ultra-efficient), Codestral 2501 (code specialist), and Pixtral Large (multimodal). Strong commitment to open weights and EU data sovereignty.
latestUpdate: Mistral Small 3 (Jan 2025) - 24B best-in-class efficiency; Codestral 2501 (Jan 2025) - top coding model; Le Chat (consumer app) with fast inference; raised €600M Series B (Jun 2024)

name: LlamaIndex
tagline: Data framework for building LLM applications over your data
description: LlamaIndex (formerly GPT Index) simplifies connecting custom data sources to LLMs. Provides data connectors, indexing strategies, and query engines for building RAG applications.

name: Microsoft Copilot 365
tagline: AI assistant embedded across the Microsoft 365 suite
description: Microsoft 365 Copilot integrates GPT-4 into Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Outlook, and Teams. Automates document creation, data analysis, email drafting, and meeting summaries.
latestUpdate: Copilot Pages (collaborative AI docs); Copilot+ PCs with on-device Phi-4; o3 reasoning in Excel & Word; Copilot Studio 2.0 (custom agents marketplace); 70% of Fortune 500 are Copilot customers (May 2025)

metrics.arr: Microsoft expects multi-$B run rate from Copilot
metrics.growth: Fastest enterprise AI adoption in history per Microsoft CEO

history: Announced Mar 2023 alongside M365 Copilot system. Limited EA preview Jul 2023. GA for enterprises Nov 1, 2023. Initial $30/user/mo add-on criticized as expensive. By 2024, Satya Nadella called Copilot 'the most important thing we've ever done at Microsoft'. GitHub Copilot (code) and M365 Copilot (productivity) became two pillars of Microsoft's AI strategy.

pricingTiers.name: Microsoft 365 Copilot
features: Excel: analyze data, generate formulas, Python

name: Adobe Firefly
tagline: Commercially safe AI art generation for creative professionals
description: Adobe Firefly is a family of creative AI models trained on licensed content. Integrated into Photoshop, Illustrator, and Express. Designed for commercially safe content creation.

name: Databricks
tagline: Unified analytics and AI platform for enterprise data teams
description: Databricks provides a lakehouse platform combining data engineering, ML, and analytics. Features MLflow for experiment tracking, Delta Lake for reliable data, and Dolly open-source LLMs.

name: Zapier AI
tagline: AI-powered automation connecting 6,000+ apps
description: Zapier's AI features let you build automated workflows using natural language, create AI chatbots, and add AI steps to existing Zaps. Connects to 6,000+ apps without code.

name: Llama
tagline: Meta's open-source LLM family - Llama 4 with multimodal MoE architecture
description: Llama is Meta's family of open-weight large language models. Llama 4 Scout (17B active params, 16 experts MoE) and Maverick (17B active, 128 experts) delivered top multimodal benchmarks at launch Apr 2025. Llama 3.3 70B remains the best open-source value for text tasks.
cons: Large models need significant GPU RAM
latestUpdate: Llama 5 (Apr 2026) — 600B+ params, top multimodal benchmarks, available via Meta AI and Hugging Face; Muse Spark closed-weight creative model (Apr 2026); Llama 5 'Avocado' projected 2027; Meta AI 600M+ MAU

name: Gemma
tagline: Google's lightweight open models - Gemma 3 leads open-source benchmarks
description: Gemma 3 (released Mar 2025) is Google DeepMind's family of open-source models available in 1B, 4B, 12B, and 27B parameter sizes. The 27B model leads open-source benchmarks outperforming Llama 3.3 70B at half the size. Features 128K context and multimodal support.
cons: Smaller capability ceiling vs frontier models
latestUpdate: Gemma 3 (Mar 2025) - 128K context, multimodal image input, #1 single-GPU open model; ShieldGemma 2 safety classifier; CodeGemma for coding tasks

name: Command R+
tagline: Cohere's enterprise-grade LLM optimized for RAG and agents
description: Command R+ is Cohere's most capable language model, specifically engineered for enterprise retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) workflows, multi-step tool use, and multilingual tasks across 10+ languages.

name: Phi-4
tagline: Microsoft's small language models - Phi-4 leads SLM benchmarks
description: Phi-4 (Dec 2024) is Microsoft's latest small language model at 14B parameters, surpassing GPT-4o mini and Gemini 1.5 Pro on STEM and reasoning benchmarks. Phi-4-mini (3.8B) and Phi-4-multimodal add vision and audio capabilities. Phi-4-reasoning (May 2025) adds chain-of-thought.
pros: Phi-4 14B beats much larger models on STEM
latestUpdate: Phi-4-reasoning (May 2025) - #1 open model on AIME math; Phi-4-mini-reasoning for edge devices; Phi-4-multimodal adds speech & image understanding; all released under MIT license

name: Grok
tagline: xAI's frontier AI - Grok 4.3 with real-time X data access
description: Grok 4.3 (Apr 2026) is xAI's latest model, part of the SpaceX/xAI combined entity ($1.25T). Features DeepSearch (multi-step web research), Think mode (extended reasoning), and unique real-time X/Twitter data access. API pricing: $1.25/$2.50 per M tokens. SuperGrok Lite $10/mo.
cons: Best features require X Premium or SuperGrok
latestUpdate: Grok 4.3 (Apr 2026) — $1.25/$2.50 per M tokens (input/output); SuperGrok Lite $10/mo; xAI merged with SpaceX Feb 2, 2026 (combined $1.25T entity); Colossus 1 cluster leased to Anthropic; grok.com free tier continues; Aurora image generation

metrics.valuation: $250B standalone xAI valuation; part of SpaceX/$1.25T combined entity (Feb 2026)

name: Tabnine
tagline: Privacy-first AI code completion for enterprise teams
description: Tabnine is an AI code completion tool that supports 30+ programming languages and can be deployed fully on-premises for maximum privacy. Offers team learning capabilities that adapt to your codebase style.
cons: Less capable than GPT-4 powered tools

name: Windsurf (formerly Codeium)
tagline: AI-first IDE with agentic Cascade engine - rebranded from Codeium
description: Codeium rebranded to Windsurf in late 2024, launching an AI-first IDE (fork of VS Code) with Cascade - an agentic engine that can autonomously plan and execute multi-step coding tasks. Acquired by Cognition AI (makers of Devin) in May 2025 for $3B.
cons: New product, less mature than Cursor
latestUpdate: Acquired by Cognition AI for ~$250M Dec 2025 (NOT $3B — that was Cognition's own valuation); rebranding to Devin Desktop (the merged IDE); SWE-1.5/SWE-1.6 coding models (Jun 2026); Cascade agentic engine powers Windsurf and Devin Desktop

name: Amazon Q Developer
tagline: AWS-native AI coding assistant with security scanning (rebranded from CodeWhisperer)
description: Amazon Q Developer (previously CodeWhisperer) is an AI coding assistant deeply integrated with the AWS ecosystem. Offers inline code suggestions, security vulnerability scanning, automated code reviews, and agent capabilities for feature development and code transformation.
latestUpdate: Rebranded from CodeWhisperer to Amazon Q Developer (Apr 2024); added agent capabilities for full feature development; automated code reviews in GitHub/GitLab; code transformation (Java upgrades, COBOL to Java); Q in AWS Console for infra questions

name: Aider
tagline: AI pair programming in your terminal with git integration
description: Aider is an open-source AI coding tool that runs in your terminal and integrates directly with git. It can edit multiple files, understand your full codebase, and automatically commit changes, making it ideal for test-driven development.

name: Devin
tagline: Autonomous AI software engineer - Devin 2.0 at $20/mo
description: Devin by Cognition AI is an autonomous AI agent capable of completing complex software engineering tasks end-to-end. It operates its own browser, terminal, and code editor, planning and executing multi-step engineering projects. Devin 2.0 (Mar 2025) dramatically reduced pricing from $500/mo to $20/mo and added collaborative features. Cognition also acquired Windsurf (Codeium) for $3B in May 2025.
cons: Can make mistakes on complex tasks
latestUpdate: Devin 2.0 (Mar 2025) - price cut from $500 to $20/mo; Cognition acquired Windsurf for ~$250M Dec 2025; Devin Desktop = Windsurf IDE rebranded (2026); SWE-1.5/SWE-1.6 models; Goldman Sachs pilot (Jul 2025); $4B valuation (2026)

name: Sourcegraph Cody
tagline: AI coding assistant with full codebase context (enterprise focus)
description: Sourcegraph Cody uses Sourcegraph's code intelligence to provide AI assistance with complete understanding of your entire codebase. As of 2025, Cody's free tier has been discontinued and it focuses on enterprise deployments with multi-model choice (Claude, GPT-4, Gemini).
latestUpdate: Free tier discontinued 2025; pivoted to enterprise-only; multi-model support (Claude 4, GPT-4.1, Gemini 2.5); Sourcegraph expanded Code Search + Cody bundle for enterprises

name: Canva AI
tagline: AI-powered design for everyone - no design skills needed
description: Canva AI integrates multiple AI features into the popular design platform, including text-to-image generation (Magic Media), AI background removal, AI writing tools, and the Magic Design feature that generates full layouts from a prompt.

name: Ideogram
tagline: AI image generation that actually gets text right
description: Ideogram specializes in generating images with accurate text rendering - a major weakness of other AI image tools. It also produces strong typography, logos, and graphic design assets with consistent text placement.

name: Leonardo AI
tagline: Game asset generation and photorealistic AI imagery
description: Leonardo AI is a creative AI platform popular among game developers and digital artists. Offers fine-tuned models for consistent character generation, texture creation, and photorealistic imagery with style consistency controls.

name: Flux
tagline: FLUX 1.1 Pro Ultra - state-of-the-art image generation by Black Forest Labs
description: Flux is a family of text-to-image models by Black Forest Labs (founded by Stable Diffusion creators). FLUX 1.1 Pro Ultra (4MP resolution) and FLUX.1 Pro set the standard for photorealism and prompt accuracy. [schnell] open-weights variant runs locally.
pros: Best prompt accuracy of any model
latestUpdate: FLUX 1.1 Pro Ultra (Nov 2024) - 4MP resolution, best-in-class realism; FLUX Video (2025, alpha); FLUX.1 Fill for inpainting; FLUX.1 Canny/Depth for ControlNet-style conditioning

name: Pika
tagline: Turn ideas into stunning AI videos in seconds
description: Pika Labs offers accessible text-to-video and image-to-video generation with a focus on ease of use. The Pika 1.0 model supports custom aspect ratios, camera movements, and seamless looping for social media content.

name: Sora
tagline: OpenAI's breakthrough text-to-video AI model
description: Sora is OpenAI's text-to-video model capable of generating up to 60-second photorealistic videos from text prompts. It understands physics, object permanence, and complex scene composition at an unprecedented level.

name: HeyGen
tagline: AI video generation with talking avatar presenters
description: HeyGen enables businesses to create professional AI-generated videos with customizable avatars, voice cloning, and multi-language dubbing. Widely used for product demos, training content, and marketing videos at scale.

name: Synthesia
tagline: Professional AI video creation with 230+ avatars
description: Synthesia is an enterprise AI video platform that lets teams create professional videos with AI presenters in 130+ languages. Widely adopted for L&D, internal communications, and customer education content.

name: Luma AI
tagline: Photorealistic 3D and video AI with Dream Machine
description: Luma AI's Dream Machine generates high-quality, physically realistic video clips from text and images. Also offers NeRF-based 3D capture technology. Known for cinematic motion quality and realistic lighting.

name: Murf
tagline: Studio-quality AI voiceovers for videos and presentations
description: Murf provides AI-generated voiceovers with 120+ natural-sounding voices across 20+ languages. Designed for content creators, L&D professionals, and marketers who need professional narration without a recording studio.

name: Play.ht (PlayAI)
tagline: AI voice platform - team acquired by Meta in 2025
description: Play.ht (rebranded PlayAI) offered AI voice synthesis with fine-grained control over emotion, pacing, and inflection. The core team and technology were acquired by Meta in early 2025 as Meta significantly ramped up voice AI investments. The PlayAI brand/service continued under new ownership/direction.
latestUpdate: Play.ht team/core tech acquired by Meta in 2025; Meta integrating AI voice capabilities into WhatsApp and other products; PlayAI brand continues but roadmap uncertain

name: Suno AI
tagline: Create full songs with vocals from a text prompt
description: Suno AI generates complete, radio-quality songs including lyrics, vocals, and instrumentation from a simple text description. Supports a wide range of musical genres and has democratized music creation for non-musicians.
cons: Commercial use restrictions on free tier
latestUpdate: Suno v5.5 (Mar 2026) - improved vocal clarity, instrument separation, genre precision; $400M raised at $5.4B valuation (Jun 2026); Warner Music settled out-of-court; UMG and Sony litigation ongoing; Pro tier $8/mo, Premier $24/mo

name: Udio
tagline: AI music generation with studio-quality audio fidelity
description: Udio (formerly Swap) generates high-fidelity music across genres from text prompts. Known for exceptional audio quality and nuanced genre blending, Udio allows users to extend and remix generated tracks.

name: AssemblyAI
tagline: Speech AI API for transcription, understanding, and insights
description: AssemblyAI provides developer-friendly APIs for speech-to-text transcription, speaker diarization, sentiment analysis, topic detection, and audio intelligence. Built for production-grade voice applications at scale.

name: Deepgram
tagline: Real-time speech recognition API built for production scale
description: Deepgram offers enterprise-grade real-time and batch speech-to-text with specialized models for different use cases (medical, conversational, phonecall). Known for low latency, high accuracy, and competitive pricing.

name: Otter.ai
tagline: AI meeting notes and transcription for every conversation
description: Otter.ai automatically transcribes meetings in real-time, identifies speakers, highlights key action items, and generates meeting summaries. Integrates with Zoom, Google Meet, and Microsoft Teams.

name: Fireflies.ai
tagline: AI notetaker that records, transcribes, and analyzes meetings
description: Fireflies.ai joins your meetings as a bot participant, records conversations, provides searchable transcripts, sentiment analysis, and topic tracking. Integrates with 40+ tools including Salesforce and HubSpot.

name: Gamma
tagline: AI-generated presentations, documents, and webpages instantly
description: Gamma uses AI to generate beautiful presentations, documents, and webpages from a text prompt or outline. Unlike PowerPoint, Gamma outputs are interactive web-based decks that work across all devices.

name: Reclaim.ai
tagline: AI calendar management that protects your focus time
description: Reclaim.ai intelligently schedules tasks, habits, and meetings on your Google Calendar. It automatically finds optimal time slots, defends focus blocks from meeting overload, and reschedules when conflicts arise.

name: You.com
tagline: AI search engine with apps, coding, and multimodal capabilities
description: You.com is a privacy-focused AI search engine with a unique app ecosystem. Features YouWrite for content, YouCode for coding, YouImagine for images, and a Pro mode with access to multiple LLMs including GPT-4 and Claude.

name: Elicit
tagline: AI research assistant for literature review and synthesis
description: Elicit automates the research literature review process by searching academic papers, extracting key findings, and synthesizing across studies. Built specifically for researchers who need reliable, cited scientific information.

name: Consensus
tagline: Search engine that finds what the science actually says
description: Consensus searches 200M+ academic papers to find scientific consensus on research questions. It highlights agreement and disagreement across studies, making it invaluable for evidence-based decision-making.

name: Qdrant
tagline: High-performance vector database built in Rust
description: Qdrant is an open-source vector similarity search engine and database written in Rust for maximum performance. Supports filtering, payload indexing, and sparse vectors for hybrid search, with a managed cloud offering.

name: Chroma
tagline: The open-source embedding database for AI applications
description: Chroma is a lightweight, open-source vector database designed for AI applications. Easy to embed in Python and JavaScript applications, with a simple API and built-in support for multiple embedding functions.

name: Modal
tagline: Serverless GPU cloud for AI and ML workloads
description: Modal provides serverless GPU infrastructure for running ML models, fine-tuning, and data processing. Developers write Python functions decorated with @modal.function and Modal handles GPU provisioning, scaling, and billing per second.

name: Groq API
tagline: Ultra-fast LLM inference - 1,000+ tokens/sec via LPU chips
description: Groq provides LLM inference at 10-30× the speed of GPU alternatives using proprietary Language Processing Units (LPUs). Offers Llama 4 Scout, Llama 3.3 70B, Mixtral, and Gemma 3 at speeds exceeding 1,000 tokens/second with sub-100ms TTFT. Raised $6.9B and signed $20B chip deal with Nvidia in 2025.
cons: Limited model selection vs cloud providers
latestUpdate: Nvidia acquired Groq's LPU patent portfolio for ~$20B Dec 24, 2025; GroqCloud inference continues independently; raising $650M growth round (2026); Llama 5 inference available; 1,000+ tokens/sec maintained

metrics.valuation: $6.9B+ (2025); patent portfolio acquired by Nvidia for ~$20B (Dec 2025)

name: Fireworks AI
tagline: Fast, affordable inference for open-source LLMs at production scale
description: Fireworks AI delivers high-throughput, low-latency inference for open-source models with a focus on production readiness. Supports fine-tuned model deployment and offers function calling, JSON mode, and embedding APIs.

name: Together AI
tagline: Affordable inference and fine-tuning for open-source models
description: Together AI provides fast, cost-effective inference infrastructure for 100+ open-source models including Llama, Mistral, and FLUX. Also offers fine-tuning, embeddings, and a research cluster for training custom models.

name: Haystack
tagline: Open-source framework for production NLP and RAG pipelines
description: Haystack by deepset is an open-source framework for building NLP applications, RAG systems, and LLM pipelines. Features a pipeline architecture with 60+ integrations including all major vector databases and LLM providers.

name: Semantic Kernel
tagline: Microsoft's open-source SDK for AI orchestration
description: Semantic Kernel is Microsoft's open-source SDK for integrating LLMs into .NET, Python, and Java applications. Designed for enterprise AI orchestration with plugins, planners, and memory components for building complex AI agents.

name: CrewAI
tagline: Framework for orchestrating role-playing AI agents
description: CrewAI is a framework for creating collaborative AI agent systems where specialized agents play different roles and work together to accomplish complex tasks. Agents can use tools, delegate tasks, and collaborate like a human team.

name: AutoGen
tagline: Microsoft's framework for multi-agent conversational AI
description: AutoGen is Microsoft Research's framework for building LLM applications using multiple conversational agents that can collaborate, debate, and use tools to solve complex problems. Supports both autonomous and human-in-the-loop workflows.

name: DSPy
tagline: Programmatic framework for optimizing LLM prompts and weights
description: DSPy by Stanford NLP replaces brittle manual prompting with a programming model. Developers define modules and metrics; DSPy compiles and optimizes prompts automatically using techniques like few-shot learning and fine-tuning.

name: LangGraph
tagline: Build stateful multi-agent applications with graph-based flows
description: LangGraph extends LangChain with graph-based orchestration for building stateful, cyclic multi-agent applications. Enables complex agent workflows with conditional edges, state persistence, and human-in-the-loop checkpoints.

name: Anthropic API
tagline: Claude 4 Opus & Sonnet API - leading coding and agentic AI
description: The Anthropic API provides access to Claude 4 Opus (top-tier coding, SWE-bench 72.5%), Claude 4 Sonnet (balanced), Claude 3.7 Sonnet (extended thinking), and Claude 3.5 Haiku. Features 200K context, vision, tool use, Computer Use, and MCP support.
latestUpdate: Claude 4 Opus & Sonnet (May 2025) - top SWE-bench scores; claude-haiku-4-5 latest fast model; prompt caching up to 90% cost reduction; MCP tool-use native; batch API for 50% off async tasks

name: Google AI Studio
tagline: Prototype with Gemini 2.5 Pro - visual playground + generous free tier
description: Google AI Studio is a free web-based IDE for prototyping with Gemini models. Access Gemini 2.5 Pro (top coding benchmarks), Gemini 2.5 Flash (fastest), and the Gemini API with 1M token context. Free tier includes 1,500 requests/day.
latestUpdate: Gemini 2.5 Pro API (Mar 2025, top SWE-bench open-model score 63.8%); Live API for real-time audio/video streaming; 1M context window; Grounding with Google Search; code execution sandbox

name: Mistral API
tagline: European AI API - Mistral Large 2, Codestral & EU data residency
description: La Plateforme by Mistral AI provides API access to Mistral Large 2 (123B, rivals GPT-4o), Mistral Small 3 (ultra-efficient 24B), Codestral 2501 (best open-source code model), and Pixtral Large (multimodal). EU data residency and competitive pricing.
latestUpdate: Codestral 2501 (Jan 2025) - 256K context, fill-in-middle, top code benchmark; Mistral Small 3 (Jan 2025) - best-in-class 24B; Le Chat assistant with fast inference; €600M Series B

name: Figma AI
tagline: AI-powered design features built into the industry standard tool
description: Figma AI brings generative capabilities directly into Figma, including AI-assisted wireframing, auto-layout, design system search, rename layers, and the ability to generate UI mockups from text descriptions.

name: Uizard
tagline: Transform hand-drawn sketches and screenshots into UI designs
description: Uizard uses AI to convert sketches, screenshots, and text descriptions into interactive UI prototypes. Designed for product managers and non-designers who need to create wireframes and mockups quickly without design skills.

name: Julius AI
tagline: Chat with your data - AI data analysis for everyone
description: Julius AI lets you upload spreadsheets, CSVs, and databases and then converse with your data in natural language. It generates charts, performs statistical analysis, and explains findings in plain language without coding.

name: DataRobot
tagline: Enterprise AI platform for automated machine learning
description: DataRobot provides an end-to-end enterprise AI platform with AutoML, MLOps, and generative AI capabilities. It automates model selection, training, and deployment, enabling data teams to move from data to production AI faster.

name: DeepSeek
tagline: China's open-source LLM that shocked the AI industry on cost and performance
description: DeepSeek R1 and V3 are open-source large language models from Chinese lab DeepSeek AI that match or exceed GPT-4-class performance at a fraction of the training cost. DeepSeek R1 is a reasoning model trained with reinforcement learning; V3 is a 671B mixture-of-experts model. Both are MIT-licensed and freely downloadable.
latestUpdate: DeepSeek R2 reported in development (Jun 2026); DeepSeek V3-0324 update (Mar 2026) improves coding; DeepSeek Prover V2 (May 2025) formal math; App reached #1 in App Store globally Jan 2025; Caused 'AI scare' in US market, Nvidia stock -17% in one day
history: Founded 2023 by Liang Wenfeng, a quantitative hedge fund billionaire. DeepSeek-V2 (May 2024) shocked with MoE efficiency. DeepSeek-V3 (Dec 26, 2024) trained on 2.8M H800 GPU-hours at ~$5.6M cost. DeepSeek-R1 (Jan 20, 2025) matched OpenAI o1 on benchmarks. App went viral globally, caused major stock market movements. Sparked US Congressional hearings on AI competitiveness.

metrics.users: ~20M+ registered users (Feb 2026 estimate); #1 App Store globally Jan 2025
metrics.valuation: Reported $5B+ valuation; backed by High-Flyer Capital

name: Meta AI
tagline: Meta's AI assistant embedded across WhatsApp, Instagram, Facebook and Messenger
description: Meta AI is Meta's consumer-facing AI assistant powered by Llama 4 models. It is embedded directly into WhatsApp, Instagram, Facebook, Messenger, and available on the web. It can answer questions, generate images via Imagine, help with shopping, and is free for all Meta platform users worldwide.
launchDate: Apr 2024 (Meta AI standalone); Sep 2023 (beta in apps)
latestUpdate: Llama 4 Scout & Maverick released Apr 5, 2025 (natively multimodal MoE); Meta AI standalone app launched Apr 2025; Meta AI built into Ray-Ban glasses; $65B capex planned 2025; Llama 4 Behemoth in development (3T params); 700M MAU on Meta AI (Q1 2026)
history: Meta began its AI push with LLaMA (Feb 2023) as a research release. Llama 2 (Jul 2023) went commercial. Meta AI assistant launched in WhatsApp/Instagram Sep 2023. Llama 3 (Apr 2024) improved performance. Meta AI standalone product launched Apr 2024 at Meta Connect. Llama 4 family (Apr 2025) with MoE architecture achieved top benchmark scores. 700M MAU by 2026.

pricingTiers.name: Free
features: Available in WhatsApp, Instagram, Facebook, Messenger

metrics.users: 700M MAU (Q1 2026); 3B+ Meta platform users with access
metrics.valuation: Part of Meta Platforms ($1.8T+ market cap)

name: Qwen (Alibaba)
tagline: Alibaba's open-source frontier model family rivalling GPT-4
description: Qwen (通义千问) is Alibaba Cloud's series of large language models ranging from 0.5B to 72B parameters. Qwen2.5 matches GPT-4 on coding and math benchmarks, is fully open-source under Apache 2.0, and excels in multilingual tasks especially Chinese and English. Qwen2.5-Coder and Qwen2.5-Math are specialized variants.
cons: Alibaba Cloud tie-in for managed use
latestUpdate: Qwen3 (Apr 2025): 235B MoE model with hybrid thinking mode; top scores on AIME, GPQA, Codeforces; Qwen2.5-Max powers Alibaba's cloud; QwQ-32B reasoning model released; 50M+ downloads on HuggingFace

metrics.users: 50M+ HuggingFace downloads; Alibaba Cloud AI platform
metrics.valuation: Part of Alibaba Group ($300B+ market cap)

name: Microsoft Copilot
tagline: Microsoft's AI companion across Windows, Edge, Bing and Microsoft 365
description: Microsoft Copilot is Microsoft's AI assistant integrated across Windows 11, Microsoft Edge, Bing, and Microsoft 365. Powered by GPT-4o and Dall-E 3, it handles text, images, documents, and can take actions in Windows. The enterprise version (Copilot for Microsoft 365) is deeply embedded in Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Outlook, and Teams.
latestUpdate: Copilot Vision (sees your screen); Copilot Actions (agentic tasks); Microsoft 365 Copilot revenue >$10B ARR (2026); Copilot+ PCs with NPU requirement; Copilot Studio for enterprise customization; Recall feature (controversial, on-device AI memory); 68M daily active Windows Copilot users
history: Microsoft invested $13B in OpenAI from 2019-2023. Bing AI chat launched Feb 7, 2023 (initially called Sydney). Copilot branding unified Nov 2023. Microsoft 365 Copilot GA Nov 2023 at $30/seat. Copilot Pro Jan 2024 ($20/mo personal). Windows Copilot key on new keyboards. Copilot+ PCs (Jun 2024) with on-device AI. $100B Stargate project announced Jan 2025.

metrics.users: 68M daily active Windows Copilot users; Microsoft 365 Copilot >$10B ARR

name: Apple Intelligence
tagline: Apple's on-device personal AI for iPhone, iPad and Mac
description: Apple Intelligence is Apple's personal AI system built into iOS 18, iPadOS 18, and macOS Sequoia. It runs AI models on-device for privacy, with Private Cloud Compute for complex tasks. Features include Writing Tools, Photo cleanup, Genmoji, Image Playground, Priority Notifications, and a smarter Siri with ChatGPT integration.
latestUpdate: iOS 18.4 (Apr 2025): Image Playground, Genmoji, Visual Intelligence on all iPhone 16; AI-powered Siri for apps context; iOS 18.5 (May 2025): expanded language support; Apple reported exploring Gemini integration; WWDC 2025: Foundation Models framework for developers; iPhone 17 will ship with significantly improved Apple Intelligence

metrics.users: Available to ~400M+ eligible Apple devices (iPhone 15 Pro / iPhone 16 / M-series Macs)

name: Character.AI
tagline: Conversational AI for creative roleplay and social interaction
description: Character.AI is a neural language model chatbot that enables users to create and talk with AI personas — from fictional characters to celebrities to custom bots. Built by former Google Brain researchers, it hosts millions of community-created characters and has become especially popular with Gen Z for entertainment and companionship.
latestUpdate: Character.AI reportedly exploring sale/partnership with Google (Jun 2025); Noam Shazeer and Daniel De Freitas returned to Google (Aug 2024); $2.7B valuation; Character.AI Memory feature; parental controls added after lawsuits; 20M DAU (2025)

name: Windsurf
tagline: The agentic IDE by Codeium that codes alongside you autonomously
description: Windsurf is an agentic IDE from Codeium that goes beyond autocomplete. Its Cascade agent can write, debug, and refactor entire features autonomously across your codebase, maintaining context through 'Flows' that understand your full project state. Available as a standalone IDE (VS Code fork) and as a plugin.
latestUpdate: OpenAI acquired Codeium/Windsurf for $3B (Jun 2025); Cascade Wave 2 (2025) with improved multi-step planning; 800K+ developers; Windsurf Pro $15/mo; SWE-bench performance competitive with Cursor

name: Bolt.new
tagline: Build full-stack web apps from a prompt in seconds
description: Bolt.new by StackBlitz lets you build, run, and deploy full-stack web applications directly in the browser from a single text prompt. It runs a complete Node.js environment in WebContainers, supports frameworks like React, Next.js, Vue, and Svelte, and can install npm packages, run tests, and deploy to Netlify.
latestUpdate: 1M+ monthly users by Dec 2024; raised $80M Series A; Bolt Enterprise launched; Figma-to-Bolt integration; StackBlitz/WebContainers powering the runtime; competitor to v0 and Lovable

name: Replit AI
tagline: Collaborative browser-based coding with built-in AI agent
description: Replit is a cloud-based IDE with an AI agent (Replit Agent) that can build entire apps from natural language descriptions. It supports 50+ programming languages, hosts your code, provides a database, and deploys to the internet — all in the browser. The AI Agent can install packages, write tests, debug, and deploy autonomously.
latestUpdate: Replit Agent GA (2024) can build full apps; Replit raised $97M (2024); Replit Teams for Education; 30M+ developers on platform; AI completions now included in Core plan; Replit Deployments

name: Kling AI
tagline: Kuaishou's high-fidelity AI video generator rivalling Sora
description: Kling AI is a Chinese AI video generation tool by Kuaishou Technology that can generate up to 3-minute high-quality videos from text or images. It supports realistic physics simulation, cinematic motion, and is widely regarded as one of the most capable video generators in the world. Available globally via the Kling AI website.
latestUpdate: Kling 2.0 Master (Apr 2025) — ranked #1 on EvalCrafter; 10M+ registered users; Kling API launched globally; 10s video standard, up to 3min Professional; advanced motion control; lip-sync feature

name: Veo (Google DeepMind)
tagline: Google DeepMind's cinematic AI video generation model
description: Veo is Google DeepMind's state-of-the-art video generation model capable of producing high-quality 1080p videos from text and image prompts. Veo 3 (released May 2026) is the first video AI to natively generate synchronized audio, dialogue, and sound effects alongside video, making it a landmark in AI film production.
latestUpdate: Veo 3 (Google I/O May 2026) — world's first video AI with native audio; generates speech, music, and sound effects; Google AI Ultra tier ($249.99/mo now $99.99); Partnership with Lionsgate for filmmaking; Veo 2 used by MrBeast and major creators; Vertex AI API available

metrics.users: Limited access, enterprise and Ultra subscribers

name: Amazon Bedrock
tagline: AWS's managed service to build with frontier AI models from multiple providers
description: Amazon Bedrock is a fully managed service from AWS that provides access to foundation models from Anthropic (Claude), Meta (Llama), Mistral, Cohere, Stability AI, Amazon Titan, and others via a single unified API. Enterprises use it to build and scale AI applications with AWS security, compliance, and cost management.
pros: Access to Claude, Llama, Mistral, Titan in one API
latestUpdate: Bedrock Marketplace launched (3rd party models); Bedrock Inline Agents; Amazon Nova models (Nov 2024) — Nova Micro/Lite/Pro/Premier; $8B+ committed to Anthropic; Bedrock Knowledge Bases with multimodal retrieval; Guardrails for AI safety; Amazon Q Business integration; $110B+ AWS investment in infrastructure 2025

metrics.users: Tens of thousands of enterprises; part of AWS $110B+ cloud revenue
metrics.valuation: Part of Amazon ($2T+ market cap); AWS $110B+ ARR

name: Google Vertex AI
tagline: Google Cloud's unified ML platform for enterprise AI at scale
description: Google Vertex AI is Google Cloud's end-to-end machine learning platform that unifies access to Gemini models, third-party models, AutoML, custom model training, MLOps, and AI infrastructure. It offers Vertex AI Agent Builder, Grounding with Google Search, model evaluation, and Vector Search for enterprise RAG applications.
latestUpdate: Vertex AI Agent Builder GA; Gemini 3.5 Flash on Vertex (May 2026); Grounding with Google Search included; Model Armor safety filters; Multi-modal RAG; SynthID watermarking; $75B+ Google Cloud capex 2025; Vertex AI Vision for multimodal apps

metrics.users: Hundreds of thousands of enterprises; Google Cloud $43B+ annual revenue (2025)

name: Azure OpenAI Service
tagline: Enterprise-grade access to GPT-4, o3, and DALL-E 3 on Microsoft Azure
description: Azure OpenAI Service provides enterprise-ready access to OpenAI's most powerful models including GPT-4o, o3, o4-mini, DALL-E 3, Whisper, and embedding models — all within Microsoft Azure's security, compliance, and governance framework. Includes private endpoints, customer-managed keys, content filtering, and Azure Active Directory integration.
cons: Higher cost vs direct OpenAI API
latestUpdate: Azure AI Foundry unifies AI dev experience (Nov 2024); GPT-4.1 on Azure (Apr 2025); o3 mini available; Batch API for async large-scale; Azure AI Studio rebranded to Azure AI Foundry; Copilot Studio powered by Azure OpenAI; $100B Stargate US data center investment

metrics.users: 53,000+ enterprise customers on Azure OpenAI (2024); $10B+ Azure AI revenue

name: Ollama
tagline: Run Llama, Mistral, Gemma and 100+ open models locally in one command
description: Ollama is an open-source tool that makes it trivially easy to download and run large language models locally on your machine. With a single command like `ollama run llama3`, you get a local model with an OpenAI-compatible API, no data leaving your device. Supports macOS, Windows, and Linux with Metal (Apple Silicon) and CUDA GPU acceleration.
latestUpdate: Ollama 0.5 (Jan 2025) — concurrent model loading; 150+ model library; OpenAI API compatibility; Ollama JavaScript and Python libraries; 100K+ GitHub stars; fastest growing open-source AI tooling; integration with Open WebUI for Ollama gives best local ChatGPT-like experience

name: NotebookLM
tagline: Google's AI research assistant that becomes an expert on your documents
description: NotebookLM is Google's AI-powered research and study tool that lets you upload PDFs, Google Docs, websites, YouTube videos, and audio, then have an AI deeply grounded in those sources answer questions, generate summaries, and even create AI audio podcasts from your material. It only uses your uploaded sources, minimising hallucinations.
latestUpdate: NotebookLM Plus launched (Dec 2024) for paid users; 50-source limit increased; Audio Overview in 50+ languages; Mind Maps feature (2025); YouTube video ingestion; 50M+ audio overviews generated; Google Workspace integration; Study feature for interactive learning

metrics.users: 50M+ Audio Overviews generated (Jun 2025); millions of active users

name: Manus
tagline: China's first fully autonomous AI agent that executes complex multi-step tasks
description: Manus is a fully autonomous AI agent developed by Monica.im (China) that can independently browse the web, write and execute code, manage files, and complete complex multi-step tasks without human intervention. It demonstrated capabilities such as conducting full research projects, building websites, and executing business workflows end-to-end.
latestUpdate: Manus public demo (Mar 2025) went viral; first to top GAIA agent benchmark; invite-only access; backed by Tencent; raised undisclosed Series A; Monica.im behind it has 10M+ users on their assistant app; direct competitor to OpenAI Operator

name: Operator (OpenAI)
tagline: OpenAI's autonomous web agent that takes actions in your browser
description: Operator is OpenAI's AI agent that can take autonomous actions in a web browser — filling out forms, placing orders, completing bookings, and navigating websites on your behalf. Powered by the Computer-Using Agent (CUA) model, it can handle tasks like ordering groceries, booking restaurants, and filling in job applications.
platforms: API (via Responses API with computer-use tool)
latestUpdate: Operator GA (Jan 2025) for Pro users; API available via Responses API; Operator expanded to Plus users (Feb 2025); expanded to 30+ countries; Instacart, DoorDash, OpenTable partnerships; Operator handles 60%+ tasks end-to-end autonomously; new Operator tasks API

name: Tavily
tagline: Search API built for AI agents — real-time web results for LLMs
description: Tavily is a search API purpose-built for AI agents and RAG pipelines. Unlike Google/Bing search APIs, Tavily returns clean, structured, AI-optimised web search results with content extraction, making it the go-to tool for grounding LLMs with real-time information. Used by LangChain, LlamaIndex, and thousands of AI developers.
latestUpdate: Tavily used in 100K+ projects; OpenAI partnership for function calling examples; default in many LangChain agent tutorials; Tavily Extract API for deep content extraction; Raised $3M seed; competitor to Exa AI

metrics.users: 100K+ developer projects; widely used in LangChain/LlamaIndex ecosystem

name: Weights & Biases
tagline: The MLOps platform for experiment tracking, model registry, and LLM evaluation
description: Weights & Biases (W&B) is the leading MLOps platform for tracking machine learning experiments, visualising metrics, managing models in a registry, and evaluating LLM outputs. Used by teams at OpenAI, NVIDIA, Samsung, and thousands of other organisations to accelerate the ML development lifecycle.
pros: Integrates with every major ML framework
cons: Can be expensive for large teams
latestUpdate: W&B Weave (LLM evaluation platform) GA 2024; acquired by CoreWeave for $1.7B (Jul 2025); Weave Traces for LLM observability; Integration with all major cloud AI providers; 1M+ users; W&B AI Academy

metrics.users: 1M+ users; 500K+ ML practitioners; OpenAI, NVIDIA, Samsung customers

name: vLLM
tagline: High-throughput open-source LLM inference with PagedAttention
description: vLLM is an open-source, high-throughput and memory-efficient inference engine for large language models, built by UC Berkeley. Its PagedAttention algorithm manages GPU memory like an OS manages RAM, enabling 2-4× more throughput than standard HuggingFace inference. Provides an OpenAI-compatible server for drop-in deployment.
latestUpdate: vLLM 0.6 (2024) adds speculative decoding, lora serving, prefix caching; 30K+ GitHub stars; vLLM Production Stack for Kubernetes; used by major AI companies for model serving; vLLM team raised $100M seed at $1B valuation (Andreessen Horowitz, 2025)

metrics.users: 30K+ GitHub stars; deployed at major AI labs and enterprises

name: Amazon SageMaker
tagline: AWS's fully managed platform to build, train, and deploy ML models at scale
description: Amazon SageMaker is a fully managed machine learning service that covers the complete ML lifecycle: data labeling, feature engineering, model training, hyperparameter tuning, model evaluation, deployment, and monitoring. SageMaker JumpStart provides one-click access to hundreds of foundation models including Llama, Falcon, and Stable Diffusion.
underlyingModel: Any (bring your own or use JumpStart foundation models)
latestUpdate: SageMaker Unified Studio (2024) — merged SageMaker + Glue + Redshift tooling; SageMaker JumpStart now has 800+ foundation models; SageMaker HyperPod for large-scale training; integration with Amazon Bedrock; SageMaker Canvas no-code ML; Amazon Q developer integration; $110B AWS infrastructure investment 2025

metrics.users: Hundreds of thousands of enterprises; $110B+ AWS investment

name: Lovable
tagline: AI-powered full-stack app builder — from idea to deployed app in minutes
description: Lovable (formerly GPT Engineer) is an AI software engineer that turns natural language descriptions into fully functional, deployable web applications. It handles frontend (React), backend (Supabase), authentication, and deployment — all from a chat interface. Competes directly with v0, Bolt.new, and Replit for the 'vibe coding' market.
launchDate: Oct 2023 (as GPT Engineer); rebranded Lovable Nov 2024
latestUpdate: Rebranded from GPT Engineer to Lovable (Nov 2024); $2M ARR reached in first month of launch; Raised $15M; 50K+ apps built; Supabase deep integration; GitHub export; Teams plan for agencies; $20M+ raised total

metrics.users: 50K+ apps built; growing rapidly in 'vibe coding' category

name: n8n AI
tagline: Open-source workflow automation platform with native AI agent capabilities
description: n8n is a fair-code, open-source workflow automation platform that lets teams build complex AI agent workflows, data pipelines, and integrations with 400+ pre-built nodes. Its AI Agent node can orchestrate LLM calls, tool use, memory, and multi-step reasoning. Unlike Zapier, n8n can be self-hosted and has no per-task pricing.
underlyingModel: Any LLM via API (OpenAI, Anthropic, Groq, Ollama)
latestUpdate: n8n AI Agents GA (2024) with memory, tools, sub-workflows; 90K+ GitHub stars; $55M Series B (2024); n8n Cloud EU data residency; MCP support added (2025); native vector store nodes (Pinecone, Qdrant); raised $120M total; 60K+ active community templates

name: ERNIE Bot (Baidu)
tagline: Baidu's Chinese AI assistant with deep integration in China's internet ecosystem
description: ERNIE Bot (文心一言, Wenxin Yiyan) is Baidu's large language model and conversational AI assistant, based on the ERNIE (Enhanced Representation through Knowledge Integration) model family. It has deep integration with Baidu Search, Maps, and the broader Chinese internet ecosystem, and is China's most-used AI assistant by enterprises.
cons: Less capable than GPT-4 on some tasks
latestUpdate: ERNIE 4.5 Turbo (2025) improves performance; ERNIE Bot 200M registered users; Baidu AI Cloud revenue growth; ERNIE Speed/Lite free APIs; Baidu investing heavily in AI inference hardware; Qianfan enterprise platform expanded
